mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_monitor_redis_log (id, connected_clients, used_memory, hit_rate, total_keys, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{connectedClients}, #{usedMemory}, #{hitRate}, #{totalKeys}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, connected_clients AS connectedClients, used_memory AS usedMemory, hit_rate AS hitRate, total_keys AS totalKeys, create_time AS createTime FROM sys_monitor_redis_log ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
